chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.665 of 2019 Collector of Customs Versus M/s Tri Angles Company Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 3200/19 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA 3201/19 Dated: 15.09.2021 None present. -.-.- This Customs Reference Application is pending since 2019 and counsel for applicant remained absent on the last date of hearing and so also today. There is no intimation either. It appears that applicant has lost interest in the proceedings. In the circumstances instant Special Customs Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
